prophecies.a: 「做你所愿即为法之全部。」克劳利预言社会将从维多利亚时代的性压抑中解放，性将被视为神圣的行为而非罪恶。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about sexual liberation
prophecies.a_en: "Do what thou wilt shall be the whole of the Law." Crowley predicted society would liberate itself from Victorian sexual repression, with sex viewed as a sacred act rather than sin.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年代的性革命在西方社会全面展开。口服避孕药（1960年批准）、花童运动（1967年夏天之爱）、同性恋权利运动都标志着维多利亚时代性道德的终结。克劳利的预言在半个世纪后被文化运动所应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: The sexual revolution unfolded across Western society in the 1960s. The birth control pill (approved 1960), the Summer of Love (1967), and the gay rights movement all marked the end of Victorian sexual morality. Crowley's predictions were fulfilled by cultural movements half a century later.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利预言的性解放在1960年代性革命中全面体现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley's predicted sexual liberation fully manifested in the 1960s sexual revolution

prophecies.q: 关于旧宗教衰落的预言
prophecies.a: 「旧神已死。」克劳利预言基督教和其他传统宗教的影响力将急剧下降，取而代之的是新的精神实践形式。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about decline of old religions
prophecies.a_en: "The old gods are dead." Crowley predicted Christianity and other traditional religions would see their influence sharply decline, replaced by new forms of spiritual practice.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 21世纪以来，欧洲和北美的基督教信仰持续衰退。2000年后，无宗教信仰人口在西方国家快速增长。但全球范围内，伊斯兰教和五旬节派基督教仍在增长。新纪元运动和替代灵性实践确实兴起。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since the 21st century, Christianity has continued declining in Europe and North America. After 2000, the religiously unaffiliated population grew rapidly in Western countries. But globally, Islam and Pentecostal Christianity are still growing. New Age movements and alternative spiritual practices have indeed risen.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利预言旧宗教在荷鲁斯纪元中衰落，21世纪后趋势明显
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley predicted old religions would decline in the Aeon of Horus; the trend became clear after the 21st century

prophecies.a: 「巴巴伦之女将骑在野兽之上。」克劳利预言女性将摆脱父权制的束缚，获得社会和精神上的完全自主权。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about the rise of feminism
prophecies.a_en: "The daughter of Babalon shall ride upon the Beast." Crowley predicted women would break free from patriarchal bondage and gain full social and spiritual autonomy.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1920年美国通过第19修正案赋予女性选举权。此后女权运动在全球展开——1960年代第二波女权主义、1990年代第三波、2010年代#MeToo运动。女性在政治、经济和社会中的地位持续提升。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1920, the US 19th Amendment granted women's suffrage. The feminist movement then expanded globally — second wave in the 1960s, third wave in the 1990s, and the #MeToo movement in the 2010s. Women's status in politics, economics, and society has continuously improved.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利的女性解放预言在1920年女性选举权运动中开始应验
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley's women's liberation prediction began to be fulfilled with the 1920 women's suffrage movement

prophecies.a:
「奥西里斯的时代已过。让他随同他的奴仆一起被遗忘。」（《律法之书》II:5）
白话文：以顺从和牺牲为特征的旧宗教纪元将结束，取而代之的是以个人意志为核心的新时代。
prophecies.q_en: End of the Old Aeon
prophecies.a_en:
"The Aeon of Osiris is ended. Let him be forgotten along with his servants." (Liber AL II:5)
The old religious aeon characterized by submission and sacrifice will end, replaced by a new age centered on individual will.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪以来，基督教在欧洲的影响力持续下降。西欧多国教堂出席率从20世纪初的50%以上降至21世纪的不足10%。世俗化浪潮在全球范围内蔓延，个人主义取代宗教权威成为西方社会主流价值观。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since the 20th century, Christianity's influence in Europe has steadily declined. Church attendance in Western Europe dropped from over 50% in the early 1900s to under 10% by the 21st century. Secularization has spread globally, with individualism replacing religious authority as the dominant Western value.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.a:
「以我的名义，我要向诸神的庙宇宣战。」（《律法之书》III:11）
白话文：传统宗教体系将遭到攻击和瓦解。
prophecies.q_en: Collapse of old religious systems
prophecies.a_en:
"In my name I shall wage war against the temples of the gods." (Liber AL III:11)
Traditional religious systems will be attacked and dismantled.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪全球经历了大规模世俗化运动。苏联实行无神论政策，中国文化大革命破坏宗教场所，欧洲教会影响力急剧下降。21世纪「无宗教信仰」人口在发达国家持续增长，2020年代美国「无宗教信仰」群体已超过总人口的25%。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 20th century saw massive secularization globally. The Soviet Union enforced state atheism, China's Cultural Revolution destroyed religious sites, and European church influence declined sharply. In the 21st century, the 'religiously unaffiliated' population continues to grow in developed nations, exceeding 25% in the US by the 2020s.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.q: 性解放与旧道德的瓦解
prophecies.a:
「拿起你的乐趣吧！对于你们之中以吃、以喝、以火、以爱的行为——以一切方式——来崇拜的人，不可有丝毫差异。」（《律法之书》I:51）
白话文：性行为和感官享乐将不再被视为罪恶，旧的道德禁忌将被打破。
prophecies.q_en: Sexual liberation and collapse of old morality
prophecies.a_en:
"Take your fill of love! ... there is no difference made among you in the matter of eat, drink and be merry — or in any way of worship." (Liber AL I:51)
Sexual acts and sensory pleasures will no longer be considered sinful; old moral taboos will be broken.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960-70年代的性解放运动深刻改变了西方社会。避孕药的普及（1960年）、同性恋除罪化运动、女权主义浪潮，以及2015年美国最高法院裁定同性婚姻合法，均印证了旧道德秩序的瓦解。
prophecies.verdict_en: The sexual revolution of the 1960s-70s profoundly transformed Western society. The widespread availability of the contraceptive pill (1960), decriminalization of homosexuality, feminist movements, and the US Supreme Court's 2015 legalization of same-sex marriage all confirm the collapse of old moral order.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.a:
「我是力量与火焰之战神！」（《律法之书》III:3）「选择一座荒岛，在那里筑起你的城堡！用钢铁武装它！」（《律法之书》III:4）
白话文：新纪元将伴随大规模战争与暴力冲突。
prophecies.q_en: Age of war and violence
prophecies.a_en:
"I am the warrior Lord of the Forties: the Eighties cower before me, & are abased." (Liber AL III:46) "Choose ye an island! Fortify it! Dung it about with enginery of war!" (Liber AL III:4)
The new aeon will be accompanied by large-scale war and violent conflict.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪经历了人类历史上最惨烈的战争。两次世界大战共造成超过8000万人死亡。第一次世界大战（1914-1918）在《律法之书》写成仅10年后爆发，第二次世界大战（1939-1945）及随后的冷战更是印证了「力量与火焰」的预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 20th century witnessed the deadliest wars in human history. The two World Wars claimed over 80 million lives. World War I (1914-1918) erupted just 10 years after The Book of the Law was written, and World War II (1939-1945) along with the Cold War further confirmed the prophecy of 'force and fire'.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.a:
「我是四十年代的战神。」（《律法之书》III:46）
白话文：1940年代将是一个以战争为主导的时期。
prophecies.q_en: "Warrior Lord of the Forties"
prophecies.a_en:
"I am the warrior Lord of the Forties." (Liber AL III:46)
The 1940s will be a period dominated by war.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1940年代是人类史上最血腥的十年。第二次世界大战的主要战事（1939-1945）几乎完全覆盖这一时期，造成约7000-8500万人死亡，包括大屠杀、广岛和长崎原子弹轰炸。「四十年代的战神」这一表述在1904年写出，精确指向了40年后的全球浩劫。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 1940s were the bloodiest decade in human history. World War II's main theater (1939-1945) nearly completely covered this period, causing an estimated 70-85 million deaths, including the Holocaust and the atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki. The phrase 'warrior Lord of the Forties' was written in 1904, precisely pointing to the global catastrophe 40 years later.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.a:
「每个男人和每个女人都是一颗星。」（《律法之书》I:3）
白话文：每个人都是独立而神圣的个体，个人意志将成为最高法则。
prophecies.q_en: Rise of individualism
prophecies.a_en:
"Every man and every woman is a star." (Liber AL I:3)
Every person is an independent and sacred individual; personal will shall become the highest law.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 个人主义已成为当代西方社会的核心价值观。从人权运动、民权运动到个人品牌时代和社交媒体的兴起，「每个人都是一颗星」的理念在文化中得到了广泛实践。世界价值观调查（WVS）数据显示，自我表达价值观在全球范围内持续增长。
prophecies.verdict_en: Individualism has become the core value of contemporary Western society. From human rights movements and civil rights to the age of personal branding and social media, the idea of 'every person is a star' has been widely practiced in culture. World Values Survey (WVS) data shows self-expression values continue to grow globally.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.a:
「让女人以谦卑侍奉男人的时代结束吧。」（克劳利论泰勒玛原则）
白话文：女性将不再被视为男性的附属，传统的性别等级制度将崩塌。
prophecies.q_en: Women's liberation
prophecies.a_en:
"Let the time of woman serving man in humility be ended." (Crowley on Thelemic principles)
Women will no longer be treated as subordinate to men; the traditional gender hierarchy will collapse.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 女性解放运动在20世纪取得了巨大成就。女性获得选举权（英国1918/1928年，美国1920年），第二波女权运动（1960-70年代）推动了职场平等和生育权，全球女性受教育程度和劳动参与率持续提高。
prophecies.verdict_en: The women's liberation movement achieved tremendous progress in the 20th century. Women gained suffrage (UK 1918/1928, US 1920), the second-wave feminist movement (1960s-70s) advanced workplace equality and reproductive rights, and female education levels and labor participation rates continue to rise globally.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.q: 旧秩序的国王将被推翻
prophecies.a:
「我将向人民发出战争的召唤。我的军队准备就绪。我将粉碎那些高居王座之人。」（《律法之书》III:5-6）
白话文：传统君主和旧权力体系将被推翻。
prophecies.q_en: Kings of the old order shall be overthrown
prophecies.a_en:
"I will give you a war-Loss. I will slay the kings on their thrones." (Liber AL III:5-6)
Traditional monarchs and old power structures will be overthrown.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪见证了大量君主制的终结。俄国沙皇（1917年）、奥匈帝国（1918年）、奥斯曼帝国（1922年）、中国清朝（1912年）、德意志帝国（1918年）等相继覆亡。二战后更多殖民帝国解体。至20世纪中叶，绝大多数君主制国家已转型或消亡。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 20th century witnessed the end of numerous monarchies. The Russian Tsar (1917), Austro-Hungarian Empire (1918), Ottoman Empire (1922), Chinese Qing Dynasty (1912), and German Empire (1918) all fell in succession. After WWII, more colonial empires dissolved. By mid-20th century, most monarchies had transformed or perished.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.q: 种姓与阶级制度的消亡
prophecies.a:
「国王与乞丐之间没有分别。」（克劳利论《律法之书》I:3的注释）
白话文：建立在出身和血统基础上的社会等级制度将瓦解。
prophecies.q_en: End of caste and class systems
prophecies.a_en:
"There is no difference between king and beggar." (Crowley's commentary on Liber AL I:3)
Social hierarchies based on birth and bloodline will disintegrate.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 传统的世袭等级制度在许多国家已瓦解。印度宪法1950年废除了种姓歧视，西方社会的贵族特权也已大幅削弱。但经济不平等在全球范围内依然严重，新的阶级分化以财富而非血统为基础持续存在。
prophecies.verdict_en: Traditional hereditary class systems have collapsed in many countries. India's constitution abolished caste discrimination in 1950, and aristocratic privileges in Western societies have been greatly reduced. However, economic inequality remains severe globally, with new class divisions based on wealth rather than bloodline persisting.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.a:
「战争之犬啊！我的工作已在你们之中完成。我的喜悦降临！你们的死亡将是可怕的，没有人能够幸免。」（《律法之书》III:46-47）
白话文：将出现前所未有的毁灭性武器。
prophecies.q_en: Weapons of fire and destruction
prophecies.a_en:
"Ye Dogs of War! My work among ye is done. My joy comes! Your death shall be terrible; none shall be spared." (Liber AL III:46-47)
Unprecedentedly destructive weapons will emerge.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1945年原子弹在广岛和长崎投下，开启了核武器时代。此后氢弹、洲际弹道导弹等毁灭性武器的发展，使人类首次具备了自我毁灭的能力。这与《律法之书》中「可怕的死亡，无人幸免」的描述相呼应。
prophecies.verdict_en: The atomic bombs dropped on Hiroshima and Nagasaki in 1945 ushered in the nuclear age. Subsequent development of hydrogen bombs, ICBMs, and other destructive weapons gave humanity the capability for self-annihilation for the first time, echoing The Book of the Law's description of 'terrible death from which none shall be spared'.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.a:
「在祭坛上有一只蛇冠之鹰。在祭坛上有仙丹甘露。」（《律法之书》I:51注）
白话文：人类将通过化学物质探索意识的边界。
prophecies.q_en: Drug use and consciousness exploration
prophecies.a_en:
"Upon the altar is a hawk-headed serpent. Upon the altar is the elixir." (Commentary on Liber AL I:51)
Humanity will explore the boundaries of consciousness through chemical substances.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年代迷幻药文化运动（LSD、麦司卡林等）席卷西方社会，蒂莫西·利里等人推动「意识扩展」理念。克劳利本人曾系统实验多种致幻剂。21世纪，迷幻药辅助治疗研究（MDMA治疗PTSD、裸盖菇素治疗抑郁症）重获主流医学关注。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 1960s psychedelic movement (LSD, mescaline, etc.) swept Western society, with Timothy Leary and others promoting 'consciousness expansion'. Crowley himself systematically experimented with various psychedelics. In the 21st century, psychedelic-assisted therapy research (MDMA for PTSD, psilocybin for depression) has regained mainstream medical attention.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.q: 新纪元的法则——意志至上
prophecies.a:
「汝之所愿即为全法。」（《律法之书》I:40）
白话文：一个以个人意志为最高法则的时代将到来，取代以服从外在权威为核心的旧秩序。
prophecies.q_en: Law of the New Aeon — Will supreme
prophecies.a_en:
"Do what thou wilt shall be the whole of the Law." (Liber AL I:40)
An age where individual will is the supreme law will arrive, replacing the old order centered on obedience to external authority.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 个人自由和自我实现已成为当代文化的核心主题，自由主义民主制度在20世纪后半叶全球扩展。然而，「意志至上」在实践中受到法律、社会规范和集体利益的制约。21世纪威权主义在部分地区复兴，完全的「意志自由」远未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Personal freedom and self-actualization have become core themes of contemporary culture, with liberal democracy expanding globally in the latter half of the 20th century. However, 'will supreme' in practice is constrained by law, social norms, and collective interests. Authoritarianism has resurged in some regions in the 21st century, and complete 'freedom of will' remains far from realized.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.q: 荷鲁斯纪元的持续展开
prophecies.a:
「荷鲁斯的表征时期将持续两千年。」（克劳利《荷鲁斯纪元》注）
白话文：从1904年开始的新纪元将持续约两千年。
prophecies.q_en: Aeon of Horus continues to unfold
prophecies.a_en:
"The manifestation of Horus shall endure for two thousand years." (Crowley's commentary on the Aeon of Horus)
The new aeon beginning in 1904 will last approximately two thousand years.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.q: 荷鲁斯之后的纪元——马特纪元
prophecies.a:
「在荷鲁斯纪元之后，将迎来马特的纪元——双重真理女神的时代。」（克劳利晚年预言）
白话文：荷鲁斯纪元结束后，将进入一个以双重真理和平衡为特征的新纪元。
prophecies.q_en: Aeon after Horus — Aeon of Maat
prophecies.a_en:
"After the Aeon of Horus shall come the Aeon of Maat — the age of the Goddess of Double Truth." (Crowley's later prophecies)
After the Aeon of Horus ends, a new aeon characterized by dual truth and balance will begin.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings

prophecies.a: 「每一个男人和每一个女人都是一颗星。」在1904年4月接收的《法之书》中，克劳利宣告荷鲁斯纪元已经开始——一个以个人意志和精神自由为核心的新纪元。
prophecies.q_en: Proclamation of the Aeon of Horus
prophecies.a_en: "Every man and every woman is a star." In The Book of the Law received in April 1904, Crowley proclaimed the Aeon of Horus had begun — a new era centered on individual will and spiritual freedom.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1904年后世界确实经历了深刻的个人主义转向——从维多利亚时代的集体道德转向20世纪的个人自由和自我表达。性革命、反文化运动、人权运动都可被视为荷鲁斯纪元的体现。但这更多是文化趋势的后见之明解读。
prophecies.verdict_en: Post-1904, the world indeed underwent a profound shift toward individualism — from Victorian collective morality to 20th-century personal freedom and self-expression. The sexual revolution, counterculture, and human rights movements can all be seen as manifestations of the Aeon of Horus. But this is largely a retrospective cultural interpretation.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在1904年4月于开罗接收《法之书》时宣告荷鲁斯纪元
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley proclaimed the Aeon of Horus when receiving The Book of the Law in Cairo, April 1904

prophecies.q: 关于马特纪元终结的预言
prophecies.a: 「奥西里斯的时代——父权、牺牲和赎罪的时代——已经结束。新的荷鲁斯纪元是个人意志和自我实现的时代。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about the end of the Aeon of Osiris
prophecies.a_en: "The Aeon of Osiris — the age of patriarchy, sacrifice, and atonement — is over. The new Aeon of Horus is the age of individual will and self-realization."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 克劳利划分的三个纪元（伊西斯-母权制、奥西里斯-父权制、荷鲁斯-个人意志）是一个神秘学框架。20世纪确实见证了父权制的衰落和个人主义的兴起，但这一框架的普适性存在争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: Crowley's three Aeons (Isis-matriarchy, Osiris-patriarchy, Horus-individual will) is an occult framework. The 20th century did witness the decline of patriarchy and rise of individualism, but the framework's universality is debated.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利1904年宣告荷鲁斯纪元取代奥西里斯纪元
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley proclaimed the Aeon of Horus replacing the Aeon of Osiris in 1904

prophecies.a: 「我是战争之神和人类复仇之神。」《法之书》第三章预言了即将到来的毁灭性战争和旧秩序的崩溃。
prophecies.q_en: War prophecy in The Book of the Law
prophecies.a_en: "I am the God of War and of the Vengeance of mankind." Chapter 3 of The Book of the Law prophesied coming devastating wars and the collapse of the old order.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1914年第一次世界大战爆发，随后是1939年第二次世界大战。这两场战争确实摧毁了旧的欧洲帝国秩序（奥斯曼、奥匈、沙俄、德意志帝国），与《法之书》中关于旧秩序崩溃的预言吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: WWI erupted in 1914, followed by WWII in 1939. These wars indeed destroyed the old European imperial order (Ottoman, Austro-Hungarian, Russian, German empires), aligning with The Book of the Law's prophecy of the old order's collapse.
prophecies.yearReason: 《法之书》1904年写成，预言的战争在1914年一战中首次应验
prophecies.yearReason_en: The Book of the Law was written in 1904; its war prophecies first manifested in WWI, 1914

prophecies.q: 关于意识扩展技术的预言
prophecies.a: 「人类将发现通过化学和仪式手段系统性地扩展意识的方法。」克劳利在其魔法实践中使用迷幻物质，预言了意识改变技术的普及。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about consciousness expansion technology
prophecies.a_en: "Mankind will discover methods to systematically expand consciousness through chemical and ritual means." Crowley used psychedelics in his magical practice, predicting the spread of consciousness-altering technologies.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年代LSD等迷幻药物在西方文化中广泛传播。蒂莫西·利里的「调整、接入、退出」运动直接呼应了克劳利的教导。21世纪，硅谷的微剂量实践和冥想应用程序将意识扩展推向主流。
prophecies.verdict_en: LSD and other psychedelics spread widely in Western culture during the 1960s. Timothy Leary's 'turn on, tune in, drop out' movement directly echoed Crowley's teachings. In the 21st century, Silicon Valley microdosing and meditation apps pushed consciousness expansion into the mainstream.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利预言意识扩展技术的普及在1960年代迷幻运动中应验
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley's prediction of widespread consciousness expansion was fulfilled in the 1960s psychedelic movement

prophecies.q: 关于东方神秘主义西传的预言
prophecies.a: 「东方的智慧将流入西方。」克劳利预言瑜伽、冥想和东方哲学将被西方世界广泛接受和实践。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about Eastern mysticism spreading West
prophecies.a_en: "The wisdom of the East will flow into the West." Crowley predicted yoga, meditation, and Eastern philosophy would be widely adopted and practiced in the Western world.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年代以来，瑜伽和冥想在西方社会广泛传播。披头士乐队1968年拜访印度大师马赫西是标志性事件。如今全球有超过3亿瑜伽练习者。正念冥想已成为西方主流健康实践。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since the 1960s, yoga and meditation have spread widely in Western society. The Beatles' 1968 visit to Indian guru Maharishi was a landmark event. Today over 300 million people practice yoga globally. Mindfulness meditation has become mainstream Western health practice.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利预言东方智慧西传在1960年代反文化运动中大规模实现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley's prediction of Eastern wisdom spreading West materialized in the 1960s counterculture movement

prophecies.q: 关于密码学和通信安全的预言
prophecies.a: 「每一条信息都必须被加密和保护。」克劳利在秘密社团通信中强调密码学的重要性，预见了通信安全的核心地位。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about cryptography and communication security
prophecies.a_en: "Every message must be encrypted and protected." Crowley emphasized the importance of cryptography in secret society communications, foreseeing the central role of communication security.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 互联网时代，加密通信成为核心基础设施。HTTPS协议、端到端加密（Signal、WhatsApp）、区块链技术都建立在密码学之上。2013年斯诺登事件后，公众对通信加密的意识急剧提升。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the internet age, encrypted communication became core infrastructure. HTTPS, end-to-end encryption (Signal, WhatsApp), and blockchain technology are all built on cryptography. After the 2013 Snowden revelations, public awareness of communication encryption surged.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利强调的通信加密在21世纪互联网时代成为核心技术
prophecies.yearReason_en: Communication encryption emphasized by Crowley became core technology in the 21st-century internet age

prophecies.a: 「人类将广泛使用各种改变意识的物质，这将成为文化的一部分而非禁忌。」克劳利本人实验过多种精神活性物质。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about drug culture
prophecies.a_en: "Humanity will widely use various consciousness-altering substances, and this will become part of culture rather than taboo." Crowley himself experimented with multiple psychoactive substances.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年代药物文化在西方爆发。2020年代，大麻合法化浪潮席卷北美和欧洲。迷幻药物辅助心理治疗获得FDA突破性疗法认定。药物使用从禁忌逐渐走向文化接受。
prophecies.verdict_en: Drug culture exploded in the 1960s West. In the 2020s, cannabis legalization swept North America and Europe. Psychedelic-assisted psychotherapy received FDA breakthrough therapy designation. Drug use has gradually shifted from taboo to cultural acceptance.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利预言的药物文化在1960年代大规模出现
prophecies.yearReason_en: The drug culture Crowley predicted emerged on a massive scale in the 1960s

prophecies.a:
「魔法是引起与意志相符之变化的科学与艺术。」（《魔法：理论与实践》）
白话文：魔法与神秘学将从边缘走向被更广泛的人群接受和实践。
prophecies.q_en: Revival of occultism
prophecies.a_en:
"Magick is the Science and Art of causing Change to occur in conformity with Will." (Magick in Theory and Practice)
Magick and occultism will move from the fringe to wider acceptance and practice.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 新时代运动（New Age Movement）在1960-70年代兴起，塔罗牌、冥想、水晶治疗等神秘学实践进入主流文化。21世纪社交媒体时代，占星术和塔罗牌在年轻人中再度流行。泰勒玛组织（OTO）在全球多国设有分支。
prophecies.verdict_en: The New Age Movement emerged in the 1960s-70s, bringing tarot, meditation, crystal healing, and other occult practices into mainstream culture. In the 21st century social media era, astrology and tarot have surged in popularity among young people. Thelemic organizations (OTO) maintain branches in multiple countries worldwide.
prophecies.yearReason: 克劳利在神秘学著作中设定了该时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Crowley set this time marker in his occult writings
